{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Forged Blackflame claws
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Forged Blackflame claws]] can chase targets.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13">''Dreadgod'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
